semantics: Cross-dataset unique match identifier. Format: '<dataset_tag>::<native_id>'. For aoestats: 'aoestats::<game_id>' where game_id is an opaque VARCHAR (variable length, no fixed-length constraint). Prefi

semantics: Match start time. TIMESTAMP (no TZ) via CAST(started_timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS TIMESTAMP). Upstream matches_1v1_clean.started_timestamp is TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE (TIMESTAMPTZ); the AT TIME ZON
invariant_notes: CONTEXT. Temporal anchor for Phase 02 rating-update loops. Chronologically faithful (TIMESTAMP ordering; upstream TIMESTAMPTZ preserved semantics).

invariant_notes: TARGET. Direct projection of p{0,1}_winner from matches_1v1_clean. Prediction label for downstream experiments.

semantics: Match duration in seconds (POST_GAME_HISTORICAL). For aoestats: CAST(matches_raw.duration / 1_000_000_000 AS BIGINT). matches_raw.duration is Arrow duration[ns] mapped to BIGINT NANOSECONDS by DuckDB
invariant_notes: POST_GAME_HISTORICAL. Available only after match end. DO NOT use as PRE_GAME feature for predicting match T outcome (I3 violation). Useful for retrospective analysis: rating-update weighting, learning-curve measurement, game-length-conditioned BTL. Phase 02 feature extractors that drop POST_GAME_HIS

semantics: TRUE if team 1 (player 1) won the match. Prediction target.
invariant_notes: [PRE-canonical_slot] team=0/1 assignment is skill-correlated per W3 ARTEFACT_EDGE (01_04_05). TARGET. Primary prediction label. Derived as p1.winner AS team1_wins. BOOLEAN strict 0/1 -- no Undecided/Tie analog in aoestats (CRITICAL ASYMMETRY). WARNING (I5): team=1 wins ~52.27% of matches (slot asymmetry). Phase 02 MUST randomise focal/opponent assignment before training.

semantics: Match duration in seconds (BIGINT). NULL count: 0. Range: 3s to 5,574,815s. 28 matches > 86400s (suspicious).

Derived from matches_raw.duration (Arrow duration[ns] -> BIGINT nanoseconds per DuckDB 1.5.1; divisor 1_000_000_000 cites aoestats/pre_ingestion.py:271). I3: NOT a direct feature for game T; safe only as aggregated historical stat filtered by match_ti

semantics: TRUE if duration_seconds > 86400 (24h canary threshold). 28 matches flagged (0.00016% of dataset).

Provenance: 01_04_03 Gate+5b (research_log.md 2026-04-18). Flags raw-data corruption for Phase 02 outlier filtering. ADDENDUM 2026-04-18.
